title: ANC - 1. Main in-call scenario > Automatic toggle to ANC feature
scenario: ANC automatically turns ON and Transparency Mode is disabled when joining a call, then restored after call ends
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Set ANC to OFF (select Adaptive or Standard).
4. Set Transparency Mode to ON (select Environment or Speech).
5. Join a call (e.g., via the app or device Call button).
6. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode states during the call.
7. During the call, tap Transparency Mode in the app.
10. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode states after the call.
11. Toggle between ANC and Transparency Mode normally.
expected:
1. ANC is OFF (Adaptive or Standard) and Transparency Mode is ON (Environment or Speech) before the call.
2. During the call: ANC turns ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard).
3. During the call: Transparency Mode is greyed out/disabled.
4. Tapping Transparency Mode during the call shows a popup stating the option is unavailable.
5. After the call: ANC turns OFF.
6. After the call: Transparency Mode becomes accessible again and is ON with the previously selected option (Environment or Speech).
7. User can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally after the call.
